title: Day 8 Revision — Will Have
keyPointsSummary: Future Perfect structure: Subject + will have + V3
Used with future time markers: by tomorrow, by next week, by then, by 5 PM
All subjects use 'will have' — no he/she distinction
Negative: will not have / won't have + V3
Passive Future Perfect: will have been + V3

quickQuiz.question: Fix: 'She will has completed the course.'
quickQuiz.answer: She will have completed the course.

quickQuiz.question: Translate: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.

quickQuiz.question: Fill: By Friday, we will have _____ (complete) the task.
Convert to question: 'You will have completed the assignment by Friday.'
quickQuiz.answer: Will you have completed the assignment by Friday?

mustRememberRules: V3 form ज़रूरी है have के बाद, base verb नहीं
Future Perfect हमेशा किसी specific future time point के साथ आता है
